characters.description: A sixteen-year-old who expects to become a Mage and use that path to investigate his missing parents. Their expedition companions accused them of murder and tyrium theft. High Priest Fusil instead forces Ruwen into the Worker class and orders his Ascendancy drowning.
characters.name: Ruwen Starfield

characters.description: Deepwell's protector deity, responsible for the local systems of Ascendancy and revival. Her temple is where Ruwen reports for class selection, and her protection defines the area in which the ascended can return after death.
characters.name: Uru

characters.description: An Order priest who blames Ruwen's family for the expedition disaster that injured his son-in-law. He bypasses the normal Ascendancy choice, assigns Ruwen the Worker class, and has him drowned despite his protest.
characters.name: High Priest Fusil

characters.description: A local tormentor from Ruwen Starfield's past who has just completed Ascendancy as a Mage.
characters.name: Slib Strongspell

characters.description: A novice Order priestess working in the temple's revival area. She retrieves Ruwen after his Ascendancy and immediately notices that he returned in minutes, far faster than the normal revival interval.
characters.name: Hamma

characters.description: A high-level Worker Collector and crew chief at the Workers' Lodge. He welcomes Ruwen, recommends the travel-oriented Collector path, and explains the benefits and lethal energy risks of the rare Voidband Ruwen chooses to bind to his soul.
characters.name: Bliz

characters.description: Deepwell's librarian and the closest thing Ruwen has had to a father since his parents disappeared. Tremine educated him, knows his ambitions, and becomes the person the Workers' Lodge directs him to consult about preparing for travel.
characters.name: Tremine

characters.description: A senior Worker planner who advocates greater equality for the class. He schedules Ruwen for a mandatory wilderness orientation and promises to prioritize his safety after the Voidband makes the young Worker essential to an unusually broad expedition.
characters.name: Pit Boss Dern

characters.description: A powerful divine adversary identified by Uru after hostile magic users target Ruwen. Uru warns that Ruwen's concealed class has attracted this enemy's attention and activates chosen helpers to keep him alive.
characters.name: Naktos

characters.description: A formidable woman who finds Ruwen through his public location setting and makes him hide it. She bears Uru's Hand mark, gives him a paired Jaga Wedding Band, and takes charge when a disguised attacker strikes the Fainting Goat.
characters.name: Kai

characters.description: The owner of the Fainting Goat. An enemy assumes his likeness during the tavern assault; Ruwen and Hamma later discover Bala unconscious but alive.
characters.name: Bala

aliases: High Mistress of the Black Pyramid
characters.description: The true identity of the fighter Ruwen knew as Kai. Kysandra leads the Black Pyramid and carries the Silent Blade. After protecting Ruwen from Naktos' assassins, she agrees to train him for the dangerous expedition he cannot avoid.
characters.name: Kysandra

characters.description: A Black Pyramid member first identified as the person responsible for tending the dangerous blood moss at Bloodgate. Kysandra sends Ruwen toward him after Ruwen uses his new mark to distinguish safe gates from lethal ones.
characters.name: Sift

characters.description: Kysandra's elder sentient dagger. Sift calls the weapon Io while explaining the old naming customs surrounding himself and the blade. Its intelligence and its place beside the Black Pyramid's High Mistress are already apparent.
characters.name: Io

characters.description: A former Black Pyramid helper whose death weighs heavily on Sift as he prepares Ruwen for the dungeon sweep. At this point, she is known through Sift's guilt and the warning her fate provides about the risks of serving as his partner.
characters.name: Lillen

characters.description: The quartermaster who controls novice supplies and token exchanges inside the Black Pyramid. Fluffy withholds equipment that Ruwen's visible level and Worker class should not permit him to use, then negotiates substitute gear without exposing his secret.
characters.name: Fluffy

characters.description: The sentient entity embodied by the Black Pyramid. Sift calls the dungeon Blapy while teaching Ruwen how its guarded rooms, quests, rewards, and escalating challenges operate during his first descent.
characters.name: Blapy

characters.description: Sift's mother and one of the Bamboo Viper clan's grandmasters. She works with Kysandra, recognizes that Ruwen's energy has become intertwined with Sift's, and helps decide whether her son may face the danger beyond Bloodgate.
characters.name: Sift's mother

characters.description: Sift's father and one of the Bamboo Viper clan's grandmasters. He works with Kysandra, perceives the unusual connection between Sift's energy and Ruwen's, and shares responsibility for the clan oath and training arrangement offered to Ruwen.
characters.name: Sift's father
